title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: A video tutorial demonstrating how to build multi-agent systems using Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) to automate Microsoft 365 to Google Workspace migrations. The example covers SequentialAgent and LoopAgent for orchestration, context caching, and deployment to Google's Agent Engine.
